privileged_info_summary: The task creates a QGIS print layout from synthetic GeoJSON data representing the San Francisco Bay Area. The source data (sample_polygon.geojson with 2 features and sample_points.geojson with 3 features) are generated by setup_qgis.sh with hardcoded WGS84 coordinates centered around Bay Area (37.5-37.8°N, 121.9-122.5°W). The task requires creating a print layout named 'Bay Area Report' containing exactly four items: a Map, a Label, a Legend, and a ScaleBar. The project file is saved as either bay_area_map.qgz (compressed) or bay_area_map.qgs (XML), and the layout is exported as bay_area_map.png to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/. The verifier checks for minimum 2 layers, presence of all 4 layout items, valid XML structure, and PNG export file size > 50KB.
